summary: Completed frontend testing of Community dropdown menu and Confirm Password field features. All 7 features tested and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Community dropdown and Confirm Password features are fully functional. All data-testid attributes are properly set for testing.
tests_passed: Community dropdown exists in navbar with data-testid='nav-community'
Community dropdown menu appears on hover with data-testid='community-dropdown'
Help Center link in dropdown with data-testid='nav-help' - navigates to /help
Forum link in dropdown with data-testid='nav-forum' - shows 'Soon' badge
Forum click displays toast notification with 'Forum - Coming soon!' message
Chevron icon rotates when dropdown is open
Confirm Password field exists on signup form with data-testid='confirm-password-input'
Confirm Password visibility toggle exists with data-testid='confirm-password-toggle'
Password mismatch validation - shows 'Passwords do not match' error when passwords differ
Submit button blocked when passwords don't match - form not submitted
Password error clears when passwords match

community_dropdown.location: Main navbar between Pricing and About

confirm_password.label: CONFIRM PASSWORD
confirm_password.validation: Shows 'Passwords do not match' error on mismatch
confirm_password.error_clearing: Error clears when typing in either password field

design_review.community_dropdown: Clean dropdown with proper styling, arrow indicator, hover states, and 'Soon' badge in muted purple
design_review.confirm_password: Consistent styling with Password field, proper error message in red color (var(--rd))
